data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Higgsfield/
data.description: Higgsfield has recently introduced a new similarity-scoring tool aimed at promoting responsible AI usage in the media and entertainment industry. The tool was launched on 13-Mar-2026 by Higgsfield through a news release on PR Newswire. The company has notified that the accompanying photo in the release was mistakenly published and needs to be revised. This tool is intended to enhance ethical practices and accuracy in AI technologies within the media and entertainment sector.

data.title: Karman Space & Defense Schedules Fourth Quarter and Full Fiscal Year 2025 Earnings Release, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Karman Space & Defense, based in Huntington Beach, California, has announced the scheduling of their earnings release, conference call, and webcast for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year of 2025. The company will be sharing important financial information and updates during these events. Stay tuned for details on their performance and projections for the future.

data.title: Chegg Reports New Hire Equity Grants Under NYSE Rule 303A.08
data.description: In San Francisco, Chegg, Inc. (NYSE:CHGG), a worldwide education company, disclosed today that on March 13, 2026, its Compensation Committee awarded equity incentives under the Chegg 2023 Equity Inducement Plan. As part of the plan, a new hire was granted 150,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) of Chegg common stock. This grant was issued in accordance with the employment inducement award exception to New York Stock Exchange Listing Rule 303A.08.

data.title: Wallbox Receives NYSE Notice Regarding Continued Listing Standards
data.description: Barcelona-based Wallbox N.V. (NYSE: WBX), known for its electric vehicle charging and energy management solutions, disclosed receiving a Non-Compliance Letter from the New York Stock Exchange on February 12, 2026. The letter highlighted the Company's failure to adhere to Section 802.01B of the NYSE Listed Company Manual, stating that listed companies must sustain an average global market capitalization of minimum $50 million.

data.title: PTC Therapeutics Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Warren, New Jersey, on March 13, 2026, PTC Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that they have given the green light for non-statutory stock options to buy a total of 14,550 shares of its common stock and 17,515 restricted stock units ("RSUs") on March 10, 2026. The company's stock trades under NASDAQ as PTCT.

data.title: Robert Hoglund nominated for election by shareholders to join the Portland General Electric board of directors
data.description: On March 13, 2026 in Portland, Oregon, Robert Hoglund received a nomination from Portland General Electric (NYSE: POR) board of directors to run for election as an independent director at PGE's upcoming 2026 annual shareholder meeting. If approved by PGE shareholders, he will serve a term...

data.title: Stellus Private Credit BDC Reports Results for its Fourth Fiscal Quarter and Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Stellus Private Credit BDC revealed its financial results for the fiscal quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025. Robert T. Ladd, the CEO of Stellus PBDC, expressed satisfaction with the performance, stating, "We are pleased to report…"

data.title: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited Announces Additional Contribution to Trust Account to Extend Business Combination Period
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA) deposited $12,203.33 into their Trust Account to extend the deadline for completing a business combination by one month, now extended from March 13, 2026, to April 13, 2026. This move allows the publicly traded special purpose acquisition company more time to finalize a potential merger or acquisition deal.

data.title: Rogo Acquires Offset to Bring AI Agents into Financial Workflows
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in New York, Rogo, a prominent AI platform utilized by top financial institutions, revealed its acquisition of Offset, an AI agent company established by Raj Khare and Shiv Shrivastava. Offset specializes in developing learning agents tailored to function within the financial sector. This acquisition showcases the continued growth and evolution of AI technology in the financial industry, highlighting the increasing importance of AI solutions for optimizing operations.

data.title: CRH Announces Intention to Delist from the LSE and Cancel Preference Shares
data.description: In a recent announcement, CRH (NYSE: CRH), a top building materials provider, revealed plans to delist its ordinary shares and 7% preference shares from the London Stock Exchange (LSE). Additionally, pending shareholder approval, CRH intends to cancel its 5% and 7% preference shares. It's essential to note that the proposed Preference Share Cancellations will not affect the ordinary shares. This strategic move marks CRH's primary focus on streamlining and optimizing its stock offerings.

data.title: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on May 1, 2026
data.description: Tysons-based Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: PK) will disclose their financial performance for Q1 2026 post-market closure on April 30, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for May 1, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to delve into earnings, operational status, and future projections. The call will be open for access via phone and internet.

data.title: Blackstone Mortgage Trust Declares $0.47 Per Share Dividend
data.description: In New York, Blackstone Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: BXMT) announced a dividend of $0.47 per share for its class A common stock for the first quarter of 2026. Shareholders of record as of March 31, 2026, will receive this dividend on April 15, 2026. Blackstone Mortgage Trust is a real estate finance company that deals with senior loans and debt investments. It is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol BXMT.

data.title: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. Declares Cash Dividend on Common Stock
data.description: In New York, TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE: TRTX) disclosed a cash dividend of $0.24 per common stock for Q1 2026. The Board of Directors declared this dividend, set to be paid on April 24, 2026, to common stockholders recorded by March 27, 2026. TRTX specializes in commercial real estate finance, dealing with origination, acquisition, and management of primarily first mortgage loans secured by institutional properties.

data.title: Lineage, Inc. Declares Increased Dividend for First-Quarter 2026
data.description: In Novi, Michigan, Lineage, Inc. (NASDAQ: LINE), the leading global temperature-controlled warehouse REIT, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5325 per share for Q1 2026. The annualized dividend of $2.13 per share marks a 1% rise from the previous quarter's $2.11 per share. Shareholders are set to receive the dividend on April 21, 2026.

data.title: FiscalNote to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results & Host Conference Call on March 19, 2026
data.description: FiscalNote, based in Washington, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company will hold a conference call on March 19, 2026, to discuss these results. This announcement comes as part of their regular reporting schedule to update investors and the public on their performance.

data.title: Ready Capital Corporation Declares First Quarter 2026 Dividends
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Ready Capital Corporation revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.01 for each share of common stock and Operating Partnership unit for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. Shareholders as of the end of business on March 31, 2026, will receive the dividend on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Metals Acquisition Corp. II Announces Closing of $230 Million Initial Public Offering Including Exercise of Underwriters’ Over-Allotment Option in Full
data.description: Metals Acquisition Corp. II (NYSE: MTAL.U) has successfully completed its initial public offering in George Town, Cayman Islands, on March 13, 2026. The Company announced the closure of its IPO, which consisted of 23,000,000 units, including 3,000,000 units sold due to the underwriters' full exercise of their over-allotment option. The public offering price was set at $10.00 per unit. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one-third of one redeemable warrant. Investors have the option to exercise each whole warrant to purchase one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share.

data.title: Caliber Sets Date for Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Announcement & Investor Conference Call
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Caliber (Nasdaq: CWD), a real estate and digital asset management company, shared plans to disclose its Q4 2025 financial outcomes post-market close on March 25, 2026. An invitation has been extended by management for interested individuals to join the webcast/conference call at 5:00 pm ET on the same day to delve into these results.
